pageTitle: Purchase Tickets | Madison Chinese Dance Academy
metaDescription: Purchase tickets for Madison Chinese Dance Academy performances.

content.heading: Splendid China - 2026 Tickets
content.body: Ticket sales are closed for Splendid China 2026, but there are still many ways to get involved and support the Madison Chinese Dance Academy.

cards.heading: Upcoming Events
cards.body: Check out our dashboard for upcoming events, including Splendid China 2027!

cards.heading: Make A Donation
cards.body: Support our mission by making a donation to the Madison Chinese Dance Academy.

cards.heading: Volunteer
cards.body: Join our team of volunteers and help make a difference in the lives of our students.
